Words like “cut money”, “syndicate control”, and “tolabazi” became shorthand for everyday governance failures. This was not merely opposition rhetoric, it was a lived experience. From construction projects to small household repairs, local syndicates were perceived to control economic activity.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/why-was-the-west-bengal-verdict-set-in-stone/articleshow/130823730.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/why-was-the-west-bengal-verdict-set-in-stone/articleshow/130823730.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 15:19:19 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>RAJEEV SINGH</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="130048" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-130824840,imgsize-130048.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[Travis Kelce plans comeback after Raiders beat Chiefs, with Mahomes factor]]></title><description><![CDATA[Travis Kelce will play for the Kansas City Chiefs for three more seasons. This decision shocked everyone who thought he would retire. Travis Kelce informed head coach Andy Reid and general manager Brett Veach of his decision after the team’s final game against the Las Vegas Raiders. He wants to support quarterback Patrick Mahomes during his ACL recovery. He values friendship above everything.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/travis-kelce-decided-on-comeback-after-las-vegas-raiders-defeated-kansas-city-chiefs-his-decision-included-patrick-mahomes-element/articleshow/130829228.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/travis-kelce-decided-on-comeback-after-las-vegas-raiders-defeated-kansas-city-chiefs-his-decision-included-patrick-mahomes-element/articleshow/130829228.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 19:13:14 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>DR. The Constitution leaves the size of the Supreme Court open-ended. Article 124(1) provides for a Chief Justice of India and permits Parliament to determine the number of other judges through legislation.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/centre-strengthens-supreme-court-number-of-judges-to-be-increased-from-33-to-37/articleshow/130831074.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/centre-strengthens-supreme-court-number-of-judges-to-be-increased-from-33-to-37/articleshow/130831074.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 19:31:42 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="174540" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-130831128,imgsize-174540.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[T20 success not enough for 'respect': Manjrekar sets challenge for Sooryavanshi]]></title><description><![CDATA[His performances have led to discussions about whether he could be selected for the India team after the IPL, and Manjrekar said he has done enough to be considered.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/ipl/ipl-2026/vaibhav-sooryavanshis-t20-success-not-enough-for-respect-sanjay-manjrekar-sets-challenge-for-rr-batter/articleshow/130828888.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/ipl/ipl-2026/vaibhav-sooryavanshis-t20-success-not-enough-for-respect-sanjay-manjrekar-sets-challenge-for-rr-batter/articleshow/130828888.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 18:06:39 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="79540" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-130828959,imgsize-79540.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[Carlsen suffers first classical chess loss since table-slam outburst vs Gukesh]]></title><description><![CDATA[World No. 1 and five-time world  Magnus Carlsen suffered his first classical chess defeat in nearly a year after losing to Jorden van Foreest at the TePe Sigeman & Co Tournament 2026 in Malmo. Arjun Erigaisi stayed unbeaten after drawing with Nodirbek Abdusattorov.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/chess/world-no-1-magnus-carlsen-suffers-first-classical-chess-defeat-since-table-slam-outburst-against-d-gukesh/articleshow/130828074.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/chess/world-no-1-magnus-carlsen-suffers-first-classical-chess-defeat-since-table-slam-outburst-against-d-gukesh/articleshow/130828074.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 17:31:16 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="30604" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-130828171,imgsize-30604.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[7 silent warning signs that may mean you need a Cerebral Angiography]]></title><description><![CDATA[Subtle symptoms like sudden headaches or vision blur could signal serious brain vascular issues.
